models.folders: Folders group documents inside the vault. Users can nest folders and assign tags to organize their knowledge.
models.tags: Tags are labels attached to documents — either user-assigned or AI-generated from document content.
models.documents: Documents are files ingested into the vault — PDFs, markdown files, images, or code files. Each tracks its embedding status and AI-generated metadata.

relationships: Each Document belongs to one Folder
Each Document can have many Tags
Tags can be attached to many Documents across different Folders

documents.title: Attention Is All You Need
documents.summary: Introduces the Transformer architecture, replacing recurrent models with self-attention mechanisms for sequence transduction tasks. Achieves state-of-the-art results on translation benchmarks.
documents.preview: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks that include an encoder and a decoder...
